notes: Day 19 (Mar 18) LATE 11:45PM ET. Sources: CNN live, AJ D19, ABC live, CNBC, Bloomberg, NPR, Euronews, Wikipedia, Hengaw 5th report, CNBC Ras Laffan, Times of Israel.

RAS LAFFAN STRUCK: Iran missile hit Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG complex (world's largest LNG export facility, ~20% global LNG). Extensive damage. Fire. Qatar expelled Iranian military/security attaches (persona non grata, 24h). CNBC/Bloomberg confirmed.

ENERGY WAR NOW MUTUAL: Israel struck South Pars + refineries (AM). Iran retaliated by hitting Ras Laffan (PM). Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas after debris. Iran issued evacuation warnings for Saudi/UAE/Qatar energy sites. Both sides targeting each other's energy production.
5TH SENIOR KILL: Basij head also killed. Khatib (intel minister) + Basij head + Larijani + Soleimani in ~60h. Katz: open kill order on ALL senior officials.
HENGAW 5TH REPORT: 5,300 total killed (4,789 military + 511 civilians incl 120 minors + 160 women). Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. Authorities concealing true figures.
OIL $111: Brent surged 7% to $111.23 on Ras Laffan strike (CNBC). WTI $100. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates citing war uncertainty. Pentagon seeking $200B+ budget.

SAUDI WARNS MILITARY ACTION: FM Prince Faisal: 'reserved right to take military actions.' Riyadh targeted DURING FM meeting. 'I cannot see as coincidental.' Intercepted ballistic missile over Prince Sultan Air Base.
DIPLOMATIC: Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Macron called for moratorium on civilian infrastructure strikes. Germany: 'crisis of gravest order.' Israel striking NORTHERN Iran for first time.

theoryBox: Day 19 late — ENERGY WAR MUTUAL: Both sides are now targeting each other's energy production. Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran retaliated by hitting Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG complex — the world's largest LNG export facility (~20% of global LNG). Extensive damage. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas. Saudi FM: 'reserved right to military action.' Brent $111. 5 senior officials killed in 60 hours. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. The energy war has gone fully mutual — every major gas/oil facility in the region is now a target.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۱۹ شب — جنگ انرژی متقابل: هر دو طرف تولید انرژی طرف مقابل را می‌زنند. اسرائیل پارس جنوبی. ایران راس لفان قطر (بزرگترین LNG جهان). آسیب گسترده. قطر وابستگان نظامی ایران را اخراج کرد. عربستان: حق اقدام نظامی. نفت ۱۱۱. ۵ مقام کشته. هنگاو: ۵,۳۰۰ کشته.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: ENERGY WAR MUTUAL. South Pars + Ras Laffan both struck. Oil $111. 5 officials killed ~60h. Saudi warns military action.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: IRGC: Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr multi-warhead. Kuwait intercepted 4 ballistic + Qatar 5 (1 hit Ras Laffan) + Saudi ballistic at Riyadh.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: Kuwait 20 drones intercepted. Gulf-wide barrage. Iran issued evacuation warnings for Saudi/UAE/Qatar energy sites.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: SURGED 7% on Ras Laffan strike (CNBC/Bloomberg). WTI $100. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates — war uncertainty. Pentagon seeking $200B+.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: Hengaw 5th report: 4,789 military + 511 civilians (120 minors, 160 women). Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. Authorities concealing true figures.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: 20+ killed in Israeli bombardment Wed (AJ). ~1M displaced (19% of population). Ground ops in south. Hezbollah facing public anger.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: 14 killed in attacks + 2 medical + Ramat Gan. 3,727+ wounded (AJ tracker). Cluster + multi-warhead missiles over Tel Aviv.

metrics.label: Energy war
metrics.desc: South Pars (AM) + Ras Laffan (PM). Habshan shut. Iran warns Gulf energy sites. Saudi: 'right to military action.' Every major facility is a target.

metrics_fa.label: روز
metrics_fa.desc: جنگ انرژی متقابل. پارس جنوبی + راس لفان. نفت ۱۱۱. ۵ مقام. عربستان: حق اقدام نظامی.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: کویت ۴ بالستیک + قطر ۵ (۱ به راس لفان خورد) + ریاض. چندکلاهکی.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد
metrics_fa.desc: کویت ۲۰ پهپاد. هشدار تخلیه تأسیسات انرژی خلیج.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: جهش ۷٪ راس لفان. فدرال رزرو نرخ ثابت. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.

metrics_fa.label: کشته ایران
metrics_fa.desc: هنگاو: ۴,۷۸۹ نظامی + ۵۱۱ غیرنظامی. وزارت بهداشت: ۱,۴۴۴ + ۱۸,۵۵۱ زخمی.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: ۲۰+ بمباران چهارشنبه. ~۱ میلیون آواره. عملیات زمینی.

metrics_fa.label: جنگ انرژی
metrics_fa.desc: پارس جنوبی + راس لفان. حبشان بسته. هر تأسیسات بزرگ هدف است.

sitrep: RAS LAFFAN LNG STRUCK: Iran missile hit Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City — world's largest LNG export facility (~20% global LNG supply). Extensive damage, fire (CNBC/Bloomberg). 4 others intercepted. Qatar expelled Iranian military/security attaches (persona non grata, 24h). QatarEnergy: no casualties. Energy war now FULLY MUTUAL — South Pars (AM) + Ras Laffan (PM).

SAUDI WARNS MILITARY ACTION: FM Prince Faisal: Saudi Arabia 'reserved the right to take military actions if deemed necessary.' Iran targeted Riyadh with ballistic missile DURING emergency FM meeting. 'I cannot see as coincidental.' Intercepted over Prince Sultan Air Base. Most dramatic Saudi policy shift since 2016.

5TH SENIOR KILL: Israel killed Basij head + intel minister Khatib + Larijani + Soleimani in ~60 hours. Katz: open kill order on ALL senior officials. DNI Gabbard: regime 'largely degraded' but 'intact.' Araghchi: 'structure doesn't depend on any single individual.'

OIL $111 + ECONOMIC SHOCK: Brent surged 7% to $111.23 on Ras Laffan (CNBC). WTI $100. Gas $3.84 (+29%), $4+ in 7 states, $5+ in CA/HI/WA. +86 cents in 18 days. Fed held rates — war uncertainty. Pentagon seeking $200B+ war budget (Haaretz). Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas facilities after debris hit.

IRAN EVACUATION WARNINGS: IRGC issued evacuation orders for energy assets in Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE — threatening further strikes 'in the coming hours.' Iran listing specific oil/gas sites as 'legitimate targets.' Both sides now in energy infrastructure escalation spiral.

HENGAW 5TH REPORT: 5,300 killed in Iran (4,789 military + 511 civilians incl 120 minors, 160 women). 178 cities across 25 provinces struck. Iran military relocating into civilian spaces (schools, mosques, dormitories). Health Ministry: 1,444 killed + 18,551 injured (authorities concealing true figures).

LEBANON: 20+ killed in Israeli bombardment Wed including 6 in central Beirut (AJ). Ground ops continue in south. 900+ total killed. ~1M displaced (19% of population). Hezbollah facing public anger from own Shiite base for 'dragging them into another war' (WaPo). Herzog: Europe should 'eradicate' Hezbollah.

MULTI-WARHEAD MISSILES + NORTHERN IRAN: IRGC launched Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr multi-warhead at Israel. 2 killed Ramat Gan. Cluster munitions over Tel Aviv. Kuwait intercepted 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Israel striking NORTHERN Iran for first time. Macron called for moratorium on civilian infrastructure strikes.
sitrep_fa: راس لفان: موشک ایران به بزرگترین LNG جهان. آسیب گسترده. قطر وابستگان نظامی ایران را اخراج کرد. جنگ انرژی متقابل.
عربستان: حق اقدام نظامی. ریاض هدف بالستیک حین جلسه وزرا. بزرگترین تغییر سیاست از ۲۰۱۶.
۵ مقام کشته ~۶۰ ساعت: فرمانده بسیج + خطیب + لاریجانی + سلیمانی. دستور کشتار باز.
نفت ۱۱۱ + شوک اقتصادی: +۷٪ راس لفان. بنزین +۸۶ سنت ۱۸ روز. فدرال رزرو ثابت. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.
هشدار تخلیه: سپاه دستور تخلیه تأسیسات انرژی قطر/عربستان/امارات. حمله 'ساعات آینده.'
هنگاو گزارش ۵: ۵,۳۰۰ کشته (۴,۷۸۹ نظامی + ۵۱۱ غیرنظامی). ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان. وزارت بهداشت: ۱,۴۴۴ + ۱۸,۵۵۱ زخمی.
لبنان: ۲۰+ کشته بمباران چهارشنبه. ۹۰۰+ مجموع. ۱ میلیون آواره. حزب‌الله زیر فشار پایگاه شیعه.
موشک چندکلاهکی + شمال ایران: کویت ۴ بالستیک + ۲۰ پهپاد رهگیری. اسرائیل اولین بار شمال ایران. ماکرون: مهلت زیرساخت غیرنظامی.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D19: fragment est. D19 REVISED UP: Ras Laffan struck (5 missiles at Qatar, 1 hit). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Saudi ballistic at Riyadh. Multi-warhead at Israel. Iran evacuation warnings for Gulf energy.

oil.note: Full daily series. CNBC/Investing.com confirmed where noted. D8 REVISED: Investing.com 52w high = $119.50. D19 REVISED: Brent $111.23 on Ras Laffan strike (CNBC), WTI $100.04. Spot $107.12 (up 6.07%). AM was $108.78 before Ras Laffan. Markets closed regular hours Sun Mar 16.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 18 (D19) LATE. Iran ENERGY RETALIATION. Ras Laffan LNG hit (1 missile, 4 intercepted). Riyadh ballistic during FM meeting. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Israel multi-warhead. Abu Dhabi Habshan shut. Baghdad embassy again.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY WAR MUTUAL: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG, Qatar (PM) — world's largest LNG facility. Extensive damage. Abu Dhabi Habshan shut. 5th senior kill (Basij head). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL — both sides now targeting each other's energy production. Iran issued evacuation warnings for Saudi/UAE/Qatar energy sites. Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr deployed. Israel striking northern Iran for first time. Kuwait intercepted 4 ballistic + 20 drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $111 (+7% on Ras Laffan, CNBC). WTI $100. Gas $3.84 (+29%), $4+ in 7 states. Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' Hengaw: 5,300 Iran dead. Lebanon 900+.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION TO ENERGY WAR. Ras Laffan strike = Iran retaliating against Gulf energy for South Pars. Saudi warning military action = potential new belligerent. Qatar expelling attaches = diplomatic rupture. $111 oil + $200B Pentagon ask = economically unsustainable. Every constraint dissolving.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: ENERGY WAR MUTUAL — Ras Laffan + South Pars both hit. Iran evacuation warnings for more Gulf sites. Saudi warns military action. Oil $111 and climbing. USS Tripoli arriving. Iran allowing limited Hormuz traffic (8 ships Mon). Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Next 48-72h critical — does Iran follow through on Gulf energy threats?

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: If mutual energy targeting continues, oil hits $120-130+. Saudi entry as belligerent = OPEC fracture. SPR drawdowns accelerate. Gas $4.50+ nationally. Macron infrastructure moratorium could become formal proposal. Hormuz partial reopening possible if Iran allows Chinese vessels.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Pentagon $200B+ budget = planning for sustained ops. But $111+ oil and mutual energy destruction is economically suicidal for the region. Gulf states may force ceasefire to save economies. Lebanon ground ops likely culminating. Iran military relocating to civilian spaces = grinding urban phase.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If no deal, regional economy in depression. Qatar LNG disruption hits Europe hard (winter planning). OPEC+ paralyzed. Iran isolated but holding Hormuz leverage. Frozen conflict most likely IF energy war de-escalates.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: Saudi military entry (transforms war entirely). Mojtaba Khamenei's first public appearance (legitimacy signal). Houthi Red Sea decision (second chokepoint). Gulf energy infrastructure damage assessment (how fast can Ras Laffan repair?). China leverage (Xi summit delayed not cancelled). US gas prices at $4+ in 7 states.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: جنگ انرژی متقابل. هشدار تخلیه ایران. عربستان: اقدام نظامی. نفت ۱۱۱. ۴۸-۷۲ ساعت بحرانی.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: ادامه جنگ انرژی = نفت ۱۲۰-۱۳۰. ورود عربستان = شکاف اوپک. بنزین ۴.۵۰+.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. اما تخریب متقابل = خودکشی اقتصادی. خلیج ممکن است آتش‌بس اجباری کند.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: بدون توافق = رکود منطقه‌ای. قطر LNG = ضربه اروپا. منجمد اگر انرژی کاهش یابد.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: ورود نظامی عربستان. ظهور مجتبی خامنه‌ای. حوثی. تعمیر راس لفان. اجلاس شی. بنزین ۴+ در ۷ ایالت.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: LEADING. Energy war went MUTUAL within hours — South Pars (AM) then Ras Laffan (PM). Iran threatening more Gulf energy strikes 'in coming hours.' Saudi Arabia warning military action = potential 4th belligerent. $111 oil. Pentagon $200B+ ask. Escalation ladder nearly exhausted — only nuclear threshold remains. Classic spiral with no off-ramp and now MULTIPLE parties being drawn in.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED further from 30%. Mutual energy targeting makes sustained low-intensity war nearly impossible — every day both sides' revenue sources are being destroyed. Can't fight a long war while destroying the money that pays for it. But if both sides exhaust advanced weapons and pull back from energy, could revert to this.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: Admin narrative still 'weeks or sooner.' Pentagon $200B+ budget request suggests longer timeline though. South Pars + Ras Laffan mutual destruction could paradoxically create exit moment — both sides claim damage to other's energy as 'victory.' But Saudi military warning complicates clean US exit.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture
scenarioProbabilities.body: 5 senior officials killed ~60h. Open kill order. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Israel striking northern Iran for first time. But DNI Gabbard: regime 'largely degraded but intact.' Araghchi: 'structure doesn't depend on any individual.' Military relocating into civilian spaces = adaptation, not collapse.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Turkey-brokered ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: Riyadh FM meeting happened but Iran targeted Riyadh DURING it. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. Macron called for infrastructure moratorium. Diplomatic activity increasing but events outpacing diplomacy. Saudi military warning could either catalyze or destroy mediation.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: Low but $111 oil creates new pressure. Ras Laffan damage threatens Qatar's entire LNG business. Gulf states may force the issue. Xi summit delayed but China has leverage. Iran allowing limited Hormuz traffic (8 ships Monday) = possible backdoor signal.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: جنگ انرژی متقابل. پارس جنوبی + راس لفان. عربستان: اقدام نظامی. نفت ۱۱۱. فقط آستانه هسته‌ای مانده.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. تخریب متقابل انرژی = جنگ طولانی غیرممکن. پول جنگ نابود می‌شود.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد = بلندمدت. تخریب متقابل = لحظه خروج؟

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فروپاشی رژیم
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ۵ مقام ~۶۰ ساعت. ۵,۳۰۰ کشته. شمال ایران. اما رژیم 'سالم' (گابارد).

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: آتش‌بس ترکیه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ریاض هدف حین جلسه. قطر اخراج. ماکرون: مهلت. دیپلماسی عقب‌تر از رویدادها.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: نفت ۱۱۱. راس لفان = تهدید LNG قطر. ایران ۸ کشتی هرمز = سیگنال؟

theoryEvaluation.title: Energy war — NOW FULLY MUTUAL
theoryEvaluation.body: The prediction that Iran would retaliate against Gulf energy came true WITHIN HOURS. Israel struck South Pars (AM), Iran hit Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG (PM) — world's largest LNG facility, ~20% of global supply. Extensive damage. Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas. Iran issued evacuation warnings for Saudi/UAE/Qatar energy sites, threatening more 'in coming hours.' Oil surged to $111. Both sides are now destroying the revenue sources that fund each other's war effort AND the global economy. This is economically suicidal for the region and unsustainable beyond days, not weeks.

theoryEvaluation.title: Military — decapitation + expansion
theoryEvaluation.body: 5 senior officials killed in ~60h (Basij head confirmed). Israel striking northern Iran for first time — expanding geographic scope. Kuwait intercepted 4 ballistic + 20 drones in single day. Iran deploying Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr multi-warhead missiles. Hengaw 5th report: 5,300 killed (4,789 military). Iran military relocating into civilian spaces (schools, mosques, dormitories) — adaptation but also potential IHL violations that complicate international support. Pentagon seeking $200B+ = institutional preparation for extended war.

theoryEvaluation.title: Political — Saudi Arabia as potential new belligerent
theoryEvaluation.body: The most consequential political development: Saudi FM 'reserved right to military action' after Iran targeted Riyadh DURING the emergency FM meeting. This is the most dramatic Saudi policy shift since 2016. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches. If Saudi Arabia enters as a belligerent, the war transforms entirely — OPEC fractures, oil could hit $130+, and Iran faces a full Arab coalition. Macron calling for moratorium. Germany: 'crisis of gravest order.' Fed held rates on uncertainty. Joe Kent resigned. The war is now generating its own political momentum that may be impossible to control.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: جنگ انرژی — کاملاً متقابل
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: پیش‌بینی حمله ایران ظرف ساعات محقق شد. پارس جنوبی (صبح) + راس لفان (عصر). حبشان بسته. هشدار تخلیه. نفت ۱۱۱. خودکشی اقتصادی. روزها نه هفته‌ها.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: نظامی — سر بریدن + گسترش
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۵ مقام ~۶۰ ساعت. شمال ایران اولین بار. هنگاو ۵,۳۰۰. نظامیان به مدارس/مساجد. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سیاسی — عربستان جنگ‌جوی بالقوه
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: عربستان: حق اقدام نظامی. ریاض هدف حین جلسه. قطر اخراج. اوپک شکاف. ماکرون مهلت. جنگ شتاب خودی دارد.

endstate.title: Most likely (40%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral accelerates as energy war goes mutual. Ras Laffan + South Pars = both sides destroying the revenue that funds war. $111 oil + $3.84 gas + Saudi military warning = crisis forcing mechanism within DAYS not weeks. Either: (a) Saudi Arabia enters as belligerent, transforming into regional war; (b) Gulf states collectively force ceasefire to save their own economies; or (c) $120+ oil triggers global intervention. Qatar expelling attaches = first diplomatic rupture that could cascade.

endstate.title: Second (25%)
endstate.body: Both sides pull back from energy threshold after mutual damage assessment. War reverts to military-only targeting at lower intensity. Possible if Ras Laffan damage proves limited and Iran doesn't follow through on evacuation warnings. But the precedent is set — energy infrastructure is now 'fair game' for both sides, making any de-escalation fragile.

endstate.title: Wild card (8%)
endstate.body: Regime fracture. 5 officials killed ~60h. Open kill order. 5,300 dead (Hengaw). Military in civilian spaces = desperation. Northern Iran now being struck. But DNI Gabbard: 'intact.' Araghchi: 'doesn't depend on individuals.' More likely: IRGC hardliners seize full control, escalate to nuclear threshold. Mojtaba Khamenei still hasn't appeared in public.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ تشدید. جنگ انرژی متقابل. روزها نه هفته‌ها. عربستان جنگ‌جو یا آتش‌بس اجباری خلیج یا مداخله جهانی.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: عقب‌نشینی از آستانه انرژی. بازگشت به هدف نظامی. اما سابقه = شکننده.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: فروپاشی. ۵ مقام. ۵,۳۰۰ کشته. نظامی در مدارس. سپاه کنترل کامل؟ آستانه هسته‌ای؟

shippingRoutes.detail: UAE shut Habshan gas after debris. Turkish Airlines cancelled ALL regional flights until Mar 19+. Iran issued evacuation warnings for UAE energy sites. Abu Dhabi gas facilities offline. Regional aviation in collapse. This route is permanently dead for duration of conflict.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed per on-ground intel despite official Turkish claims of neutrality. Turkey deployed F-16s and air defenses to Northern Cyprus. NATO intercepted 2 Iranian missiles over Turkish airspace (Gaziantep). Turkey–Iran land border effectively shut for commercial traffic. NATO missile over Gaziantep = Turkey is no longer a safe corridor.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Border needs fresh verification. CRITICAL NEW RISK: Israel now striking NORTHERN Iran for first time — brings strikes closer to Armenian border/Tabriz corridor. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck (Hengaw). Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Military relocating to civilian spaces. Internet blackout 3 weeks. This route's viability is DECLINING as war expands north.

Eastern borders not directly in combat zone but infrastructure is minimal. Pakistan border areas have own security challenges. Afghanistan route non-viable. Turkmenistan transit requires diplomatic arrangements that don't exist. No established book logistics on any of these routes.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: حبشان بسته. ترکیش ایرلاینز لغو. هشدار تخلیه انرژی. هواپیمایی فروپاشی.
بسته علیرغم ادعای ترکیه. ناتو موشک بر فراز غازیان‌تپ رهگیری کرد.
حملات شمال ایران اولین بار = نزدیک‌تر به مرز. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان. امکان‌پذیری کاهش.
زیرساخت ناکافی. امنیت ضعیف. مسیر کتاب وجود ندارد.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. Iran imports virtually all pulp. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed → no imports. Existing warehouse stock only. South Pars strike + Ras Laffan = energy crisis worsening — gas shortages imminent.

Internet blackout: 3 weeks. Hengaw confirms authorities checking phones at checkpoints, arresting people for sharing information with foreign media. Online book sales ↓80%+. Total communications isolation deepening.

Power outages: Sustained and WORSENING. Israel now striking northern Iran for first time. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck (Hengaw). Military relocating into schools/dormitories = further civilian infrastructure damage.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Israel expanding strikes to northern provinces. Cultural infrastructure at extreme risk across entire country.
56+ cultural sites damaged. Hengaw 5th report: 5,300 dead. Strikes across 25 provinces = virtually no safe area for publishing operations.
New title production: Effectively halted. Only pre-war warehouse stock available. Distribution networks non-functional. Military using civilian spaces = printing facilities at risk.

Assessment: Iranian publishing industry in existential crisis. Energy war escalation (South Pars) will worsen power situation further. Even warehouse stock access becoming difficult as military relocates into civilian areas. Recovery timeline: years minimum.
publishingStatus_fa: کاغذ: بحرانی. واردات متوقف. پارس جنوبی = بحران گاز.
قطع اینترنت: ۳ هفته. بازرسی گوشی در ایست‌بازرسی. فروش آنلاین ↓۸۰٪+.
قطع برق: بدتر. شمال ایران اولین بار. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان.
اصفهان + شیراز: بمباران مداوم. گسترش به شمال.
تولید متوقف. نظامیان در مدارس = چاپخانه‌ها در خطر.
بحران وجودی. تشدید جنگ انرژی = برق بدتر. بازسازی: سال‌ها.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. Turkish Airlines cancelled flights to Iraq, Syria, Lebanon, Jordan, Doha, Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Kuwait, Bahrain, Dammam until Mar 19+. Regional aviation collapsing.

BEST ALTERNATIVE: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) border — status needs fresh verification. Israel now striking NORTHERN Iran for first time, which brings strikes closer to Armenian border. Domestic Iran leg (700km) through 25 provinces being struck (Hengaw). Risk increased.

SUPPLY SOURCE DETERIORATING: Military relocating into civilian spaces including schools and dormitories (Hengaw). Warehouse access may be compromised. South Pars strike = worsening power/gas crisis. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. Not affected by war. Payment via KEMCO SARL still viable in principle but Qatar expelling Iranian attaches + Saudi military warning = regional compliance environment tightening significantly.
FINANCIAL: Rial in freefall. Oil $111 = global inflation pressure. Fed held rates on uncertainty. KEMCO/French banking under increased scrutiny as war expands.

WINDOW CLOSING: Pre-war stocks depleting. Military in civilian spaces = warehouse access risk. Armenia route viability decreased by northern Iran strikes. Every day of delay reduces accessible inventory.
impactIranfarhang_fa: مسیر اصلی مرده: ترکیش ایرلاینز همه پروازها لغو. هواپیمایی منطقه فروپاشی.
ارمنستان: حملات شمال ایران اولین بار = نزدیک‌تر به مرز. خطر افزایش.
منبع تأمین بدتر: نظامیان در مدارس/خوابگاه. دسترسی انبار مشکل. ۱۷۸ شهر.
OFAC: معافیت معتبر. اما قطر اخراج + عربستان نظامی = محیط سخت‌تر.
مالی: ریال سقوط. نفت ۱۱۱. فدرال رزرو. KEMCO تحت فشار.
پنجره بسته می‌شود: موجودی کم. نظامی در فضای غیرنظامی. شمال ایران.
prepIranfarhang: Activate Armenia route exploration: Contact Yerevan-based logistics contacts. Assess Agarak/Norduz border crossing capacity for book freight.
Identify Tehran warehouse partners willing/able to load and dispatch to Armenian border despite domestic conditions (no internet, active strikes).
Pre-negotiate Yerevan→port (Poti, Georgia or Batumi)→sea freight→US routing and costs.
Accelerate procurement of any accessible pre-war inventory — prioritize high-demand university titles.
Brief university library clients on supply disruption timeline and potential delays. Set expectations for 3-6 month procurement window.
Monitor KEMCO payment channel capacity — confirm French bank compliance posture hasn't changed since war began.
Prepare contingency for total supply interruption lasting 6+ months.
prepIranfarhang_fa: بررسی مسیر ارمنستان: تماس با شرکای لجستیکی ایروان.
شناسایی انبارهای تهران آماده ارسال به مرز ارمنستان.
اطلاع‌رسانی به کتابخانه‌های دانشگاهی درباره تأخیرات.
signalsIranfarhang: CRITICAL: Israel strikes on NORTHERN Iran — if sustained, Armenia border route viability drops sharply. Watch for strikes near Tabriz/East Azerbaijan.
CRITICAL: Iran evacuation warnings for Gulf energy sites — if Iran follows through, regional logistics completely collapse. Supply routes via Georgia/Turkey also disrupted.
WATCH: Armenia border status in US Embassy Yerevan daily alerts. Northern Iran strikes make this urgent.
WATCH: Saudi military action decision — if Saudi enters war, ALL Middle East logistics shut down.
WATCH: Ras Laffan damage assessment — if Qatar LNG is offline long-term, Europe winter energy crisis = global repercussions.
WATCH: Iran allowing limited Hormuz traffic (8 ships Mon) — if this increases, partial reopening signal.
signalsIranfarhang_fa: بحرانی: حملات شمال ایران — اگر ادامه یابد، مرز ارمنستان خطر.
بحرانی: هشدار تخلیه انرژی خلیج — لجستیک منطقه فروپاشی.
impactKIP: Iran-UAE corridor: DEAD. Turkish Airlines cancelled all regional flights. Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas facilities after debris. Iran evacuation warnings for UAE energy sites. IRGC: UAE bases 'legitimate targets.'
UAE asset risk: HIGH. Abu Dhabi Habshan gas shut = first major UAE energy disruption from war. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches = diplomatic rupture spreading. UAE may follow with asset freezes.

Hormuz: Closed but Iran allowing LIMITED traffic — 8 vessels Monday, 'nearly double' recent days (AJ). Possible backdoor for negotiated passage. USS Tripoli arriving. But Iran threatened more energy strikes.
QATAR RUPTURED: Ras Laffan struck. Attaches expelled. Qatar was a potential mediator — now a target. This eliminates a diplomatic channel and escalates Gulf crisis significantly.
Banking: Qatar rupture + Saudi military warning = regional banking compliance at maximum tightness. Any Iran-connected financial flows face extreme scrutiny. KEMCO channel under pressure.
Physical security: Iran issued evacuation warnings for energy assets across Saudi/UAE/Qatar. Operating environment for ALL business personnel in Gulf is dangerous. Regional aviation shutting down.
impactKIP_fa: مسیر ایران-امارات: مرده. ترکیش ایرلاینز لغو. حبشان بسته. هشدار تخلیه.
دارایی‌ها امارات: بالا. حبشان = اولین اختلال انرژی امارات. قطر اخراج = شکاف دیپلماتیک.
هرمز: بسته اما ۸ کشتی دوشنبه. ناو تریپلی. اما تهدید انرژی.
قطر شکاف: راس لفان + اخراج. میانجی‌گری از بین رفت.
بانکداری: شکاف قطر + عربستان نظامی = حداکثر سخت‌گیری.
امنیت: هشدار تخلیه انرژی. هواپیمایی بسته. خطرناک.
prepKIP: Assess all KIP assets in UAE for exposure to both military risk and potential asset freeze.
Establish emergency communication protocols that don't depend on Iranian internet (satellite phone, third-country relay).
Diversify banking away from UAE — consider Oman, Turkey, or other jurisdictions less directly involved in conflict.
Suspend any new UAE-bound shipments until Hormuz reopens and airport operations normalize.
Prepare legal contingency for potential UAE asset freeze or enhanced sanctions screening.
Identify alternative logistics hubs: Oman (Muscat/Sohar), Turkey (Mersin), Georgia (Poti/Batumi).
Monitor insurance market — current premiums for Gulf operations may be prohibitive.
Brief all personnel in UAE on physical security — avoid proximity to military installations, airports, and oil infrastructure.
prepKIP_fa: پروتکل ارتباطی اضطراری بدون اینترنت ایران.
تنوع‌بخشی بانکی به عمان، ترکیه یا گرجستان.
توقف محموله‌های جدید تا بازگشایی هرمز.
آمادگی حقوقی برای انجماد احتمالی دارایی.
شناسایی هاب‌های جایگزین: مسقط، مرسین، پوتی.
signalsKIP: CRITICAL: Iran follow-through on Gulf energy evacuation warnings — next 24-48h determines if mutual energy war escalates further.
CRITICAL: Saudi Arabia military action decision — if Saudi enters as belligerent, all Gulf business operations shut down entirely.
CRITICAL: UAE/Qatar asset freeze announcements — Qatar expelled attaches, UAE may escalate to asset freezes next.
WATCH: Ras Laffan damage assessment — duration of Qatar LNG outage determines regional economic trajectory.
WATCH: Iran Hormuz traffic (8 ships Monday) — increasing traffic = possible negotiated passage. Decreasing = full blockade.
WATCH: Regional aviation resumption — Turkish Airlines cancelled until Mar 19+. Regional transport collapsing.
WATCH: Insurance market — Ras Laffan strike will cause massive premium increases across Gulf.
WATCH: China-Iran trade flows — Xi summit delayed but China's response to Ras Laffan is key.
signalsKIP_fa: بحرانی: پیگیری هشدار تخلیه انرژی ایران — ۲۴-۴۸ ساعت.
بحرانی: تصمیم نظامی عربستان — ورود = توقف کامل.
